# Is That Still True?

> Discover outdated facts you learned in school. Enter your graduation year and country to reveal what science has since debunked or updated, with sources you can verify.

Is That Still True? uses AI to compare what was taught in school curricula with the latest scientific findings. Every fact links to a verified source (Wikipedia, academic journals, government data). Free to use, no signup required.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Generate outdated facts based on your graduation year and country.
- [Ask the Bot](/ask): Ask the fact-checker bot any question and get a sourced answer.
- [Quiz](/quiz): Ten-question quiz testing whether common school facts are still true.
- [How It Works](/how-it-works): Four-step explanation of the AI research pipeline.
- [About](/about): Mission and team behind Is That Still True?

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
